changelog: Added 2 real Colab T4 AWQ rows: gemma-2b-it and llama-3.2-3b.
source_notes: Seed rows are synthetic baseline estimates. real_cpu rows measured on an 8GB laptop using llama-cpp-python. real_colab_t4 rows measured on Google Colab free T4 using autoawq with fuse_layers=False.
hardware_notes: GPU_T4 = Google Colab free tier Tesla T4 16GB VRAM. AWQ throughput may underrepresent optimized fused AWQ performance because fuse_layers=False was used for compatibility.
